# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing architecture

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    Description: Environment name for resource naming
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
  
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (default 4 days)
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
  
  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
  
  MaxMessageSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 262144
    Description: Maximum message size in bytes (default 256 KB)
    MinValue: 1024
    MaxValue: 262144
  
  DelaySeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
    Description: Delivery delay in seconds
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 900

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      MaximumMessageSize: !Ref MaxMessageSize
      DelaySeconds: !Ref DelaySeconds
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EventProcessing

  EventProcessingDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-dlq
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: DeadLetterQueue

  EventProcessingQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: AllowAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-topic
      DisplayName: Event Processing Topic
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EventProcessing

  EventProcessingTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAccountPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action:
              - SNS:Publish
              - SNS:Subscribe
              - SNS:Receive
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: AllowServicesPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - events.amazonaws.com
                - cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - SNS:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic

  QueueSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  SecondaryQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-secondary-processing-queue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecondaryProcessing

  SecondaryQueueSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt SecondaryQueue.Arn
      FilterPolicy:
        eventType:
          - analytics
          - logging

  SecondaryQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SecondaryQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SecondaryQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic

  QueueDepthAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-queue-depth-alarm
      AlarmDescription: Alert when queue depth exceeds threshold
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 1000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the event processing queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueURL

  QueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the event processing queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueARN

  QueueName:
    Description: Name of the event processing queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueName

  DeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingDLQ
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingDLQURL

  DeadLetterQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingDLQ.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingDLQARN

  TopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the event processing topic
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingTopicARN

  TopicName:
    Description: Name of the event processing topic
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.TopicName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingTopicName

  SecondaryQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the secondary processing queue
    Value: !Ref SecondaryQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-SecondaryQueueURL

  SecondaryQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the secondary processing queue
    Value: !GetAtt SecondaryQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-SecondaryQueueARN
